stories.title: Inside the Broncos' playoff run: Fifteen days with Sean Payton
stories.summary: Senior writer Seth Wickersham spent two weeks with NFL football coach Sean Payton ahead of the Denver Broncos-New England Patriots AFC Championship Game.

stories.title: Late Cowboys' player Kneeland diagnosed with CTE
stories.summary: Former Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland has been posthumously diagnosed with CTE.

stories.title: Sources: Finals MVP Brunson having wrist surgery
stories.summary: Knicks guard Jalen Brunson is undergoing surgery on his left wrist, and the NBA Finals MVP is expected to return to basketball activities later this summer, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Cavs' Mitchell agrees to $273M max extension
stories.summary: Donovan Mitchell has agreed to a four-year, $273 million maximum extension with the Cavs, including a player option for the 2030-31 season, per his agent.

stories.title: Gauff, 22, reaches her first Wimbledon semifinal
stories.summary: Coco Gauff rallied past Jessica Pegula on Tuesday to reach her first Wimbledon semifinal at age 22.
